changes.description: Section 1 Body Overview primary sentence — derived from clinician_report_v1.sections.page1
changes.root_cause: arbitration_result is not in the frontend DTO. clinician_report_v1.sections.page1.primary_concern (analysis.ts:180) is already typed, available, and live in the results page. primary_concern answers what stands out and whether there is a clear lead concern. top_hypothesis_line (analysis.ts:183) provides a shaped fallback.
changes.scope_constraint: Shape into a single sentence. Do not render raw page1 blocks. Fall back to safe message if page1 is missing.

changes.description: Section 1 visual system summary — derived from clusters and/or balanced_systems_v1
changes.root_cause: system_capacity_scores is absent from frontend types. clusters (analysis.ts:106, results page:135) already carry severity + score per system and are fully typed. balanced_systems_v1 provides stable-system labels. Together these support a quick-scan overview without new DTO fields.
changes.scope_constraint: Simple scan — no heavy animation. May reuse or adapt ClusterSummary. Do not create duplicate rendering logic.

changes.description: Section 2 stable systems — derived from balanced_systems_v1 only
changes.root_cause: adjusted_system_burden_vector is not in the frontend DTO. balanced_systems_v1 is the pre-compiled stable-systems artifact (analysis.ts:235, BalancedSystemsSummary.tsx:24). It already filtered and compiled from the burden vector on the backend. No frontend cross-check needed.
changes.scope_constraint: Use balanced_systems_v1 directly. BalancedSystemsSummary component already handles null/empty safely (line 25). Reposition to Section 2 — do not rewrite the component unless reuse introduces inconsistency.

stop_conditions_verified: Do not reference arbitration_result, system_capacity_scores, or adjusted_system_burden_vector — prompt prohibits these in three separate locations (lines 68-71, 88-93, 246-247)
Do not add new backend DTO fields — explicitly out of scope (prompt line 44)
Do not expand into Section 3+ or later journey sections — prompt line 40
Do not fabricate text if data is missing — use specified fallbacks (prompt lines 187-198)
Do not create new components if existing ones (BalancedSystemsSummary, ClusterSummary, InsightPanel) can be reused or adapted
regression_protection: navigation — existing router logic in results page must be unchanged
analysis loading — useAnalysisResult / analysisStore wiring must be unchanged
existing components — InsightPanel, PipelineStatus, RootCauseEvidenceSummary, BiomarkerDials, ClusterSummary, Advanced analysis section must remain functional
BalancedSystemsSummary null/empty guard (line 25) must be preserved if component is adapted
determinism_risks: NONE — sprint is purely frontend presentation. No analytics logic, ranking logic, or pipeline touched.
behavioural_surface_area: frontend/app/(app)/results/page.tsx — section ordering and layout restructure
new BodyOverview section component (if created) — consumes clinician_report_v1.sections.page1 and clusters
forbidden_fields_confirmed_absent: arbitration_result — not in frontend DTO, not in analysis.ts, prohibited by prompt
system_capacity_scores — not in frontend types, prohibited by prompt
adjusted_system_burden_vector — not in frontend DTO, not in analysis.ts, prohibited by prompt
